Event: Spicy Mole-opoly
Event Date: 26/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM345
Symphony of the Sands Amulet

Once in a while, the unit gains a shield equal to 70% of the amulet wearer's maximum health. The shield blocks damage of any type and exists for 4 sec. Every second for the shield's duration, the unit and 2 allied units with the lowest current health restore 15% health. When the shield expires, all enemy units receive physical damage equal to 55% of the amulet wearer's maximum health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Spicy Mole-opoly

Event date: 26/05/2026

Sage bot code: AM345

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
